/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/5.0.7/libexec/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -fexceptions -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=dazzleModule -sENVIRONMENT=web -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432 -sMAXIMUM_MEMORY=2147483648 -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall,cwrap,UTF8ToString,stringToUTF8,lengthBytesUTF8,HEAPU8,HEAPF32 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_malloc,_free,_dazzle_hset,_dazzle_hget,_dazzle_hdel,_dazzle_hexists,_dazzle_hgetall,_dazzle_del,_dazzle_vs_create,_dazzle_vs_add,_dazzle_vs_search,_dazzle_vs_search_ids,_dazzle_vs_drop,_dazzle_save_snapshot,_dazzle_load_snapshot,_dazzle_snapshot_release,_dazzle_version,_dazzle_clear @CMakeFiles/dazzle.dir/objects1.rsp -o dazzle.js
